ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security for which data is recorded */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was recorded */,
  "bid_open" REAL /* Opening bid price */,
  "bid_high" REAL /* Highest bid price during the interval */,
  "bid_low" REAL /* Lowest bid price during the interval */,
  "bid_close" REAL /* Closing bid price */,
  "ask_open" REAL /* Opening ask price */,
  "ask_high" REAL /* Highest ask price during the interval */,
  "ask_low" REAL /* Lowest ask price during the interval */,
  "ask_close" REAL /* Closing ask price */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session during which the data was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., equity, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the security information was last updated */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the session */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is currently active */,
  "trading_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is a trading holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_password_reset" TEXT /* Date of the last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* String representation of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical market data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security for which historical data is recorded */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "bid_open" REAL /* Opening bid price */,
  "bid_high" REAL /* Highest bid price during the interval */,
  "bid_low" REAL /* Lowest bid price during the interval */,
  "bid_close" REAL /* Closing bid price */,
  "ask_open" REAL /* Opening ask price */,
  "ask_high" REAL /* Highest ask price during the interval */,
  "ask_low" REAL /* Lowest ask price during the interval */,
  "ask_close" REAL /* Closing ask price */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of securities being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, executed) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the order expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade execution record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Execution price at which the trade was executed */,
  "execution_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of securities that were executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade execution took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_executions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the market index */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Type of audit action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit action took place */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the audit action */,
  "affected_record" INTEGER /* Record affected by the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the compliance report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
